description: CRITICAL: ALWAYS call this tool - NEVER make up, guess, or fabricate data. Subscribe to a webhook event

target_url.description: The webhook target URL to receive events

event.description: The event type to subscribe to (e.g., INCOMING_MESSAGE)

partnerClientCode.description: Optional partner client code to manage webhooks for a specific partner office/sub-client. Only use when explicitly requested by the user.
